must_detect.matched_text: DSAR and Erasure: No outstanding DSARs; a prior erasure request for a legacy recruitment profile (Ref CR-09A) was completed and logged pursuant to APPI guidance.

Term Sheet (Japan) — Strategic Investment by Shiori Nexus GK in Midoriyama Dynamics Kabushiki Kaisha (TSE Growth)
Structure: Third-Party Allotment of new common shares; no tender offer (TOB) obligations triggered under FIEA based on current thresholds and already-published facts.
Conditions Precedent: Board approvals of both parties, completion of TSE Timely Disclosure filings, and confirmation that no undisclosed enumerated material facts or tender-offer facts exist.
MNPI Status: All material items (business alliance scope, governance changes, and share issuance outline) have been publicly announced; no reliance on undisclosed FIEA facts for investment decisions.
Data Governance (APPI): Processing governed by the parties’ Data Processing Addendum (DPA) Schedule B (JP); onboarding forms incorporate APPI notices; no My Number (個人番号) will be collected or processed for this transaction.
Positive—Data Export Approval: DEX-045 authorizes a limited cross-border transfer of anonymised employee onboarding metadata to the Singapore affiliate under DPA Schedule B with Article 28 disclosures; no identifiable payroll or My Number data included.
Consent and Withdrawal: Employee consents for ancillary analytics are optional and revocable; as of signing, there are no pending consent withdrawals affecting transaction-critical systems.
DSAR and Erasure: No outstanding DSARs; a prior erasure request for a legacy recruitment profile (Ref CR-09A) was completed and logged pursuant to APPI guidance.
Retention and Minimisation: Retention schedule for onboarding forms is two years from start date, with automated purge completed for records past term; minimisation restricts fields to role, department, and work alias only.
Security & Subprocessors: Subprocessors are listed in DPA Schedule C; no offshore PII flows occur other than as approved by DEX-045; domestic payroll processing remains with Hoshizaki Data Services KK under a JP-only boundary.
Representations: The Issuer represents that personal data in diligence rooms are redacted or pseudonymised; no live production My Number repositories are exposed to the Investor.
Corporate Actions: Investor receives one non-executive observer seat subject to TSE independence guidelines; no control change or delisting intention is contemplated.
Regulatory: Any FIEA large-shareholding or anti-monopoly notifications, if triggered, will be filed by the applicable statutory deadlines; this term sheet does not constitute a securities solicitation.
